subcodes.first_line: O My leaf and My handmaiden! Upon thee be My glory! Today the world is illumined by the lights of the Luminary of Manifestation, and all atoms [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ورقتی و یا امتی علیک بهائی امروز عالم بانوار نیر ظهور منور و جمیع ذرات
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @chastisement and requital, @thankfulness; gratitude, @praise and encouragement
